testcase.name: test_list_all_products

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 10 == 11 + where 10 = len([{'category': 'men', 'colors': ['Black'], 'created_at': '2026-05-06T15:03:05.431200Z', 'description': 'Manifesto print on chest and sleeves.
